$comment: HISTORICAL — the `workspace_tags` field was REMOVED in the v8 clean cut. Belonging-entity references now use `project[]` / `repo[]` (see schemas/skill.schema.json). This vocabulary is retained ONLY as a reference for migrating pre-v8 skills that still carry `workspace_tags`; it is NOT part of the current authoring contract and no live tooling loads it. Original note (pre-v8): Controlled vocabulary for the `workspace_tags` field; adopters declared literal project handles in `.skill-graph/config.json`; semantic tags below were illustrative categories; soft-advisory (skill-lint.js emitted a WARNING for unknown tags).
